emails.subject: Congrats
emails.body: Congrats Sally, Congratulations!! Very much deserved! I hope everything else is going well. Let's try to do lunch soon. Kristin

emails.subject: Re: Congrats
emails.body: Re: Congrats Thanks for your note. I will copy Patti on this reply and ask her to set us up for lunch when I am back from London. --Sally
